data.content: Implementation review REJECTED. Violations: (1) ESLint rules for max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and max-len were deleted from eslint.config.mjs — the beat requires fixing warnings, not removing the rules that produce them. (2) Code Style Constraints documentation removed from CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md — out of scope. (3) Unrelated removal of .claude/worktrees/** ignore pattern in eslint.config.mjs. The component refactoring in src/components/ appears correct and well-done. Only the config/doc changes need to be reverted.
